summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink PWA deep linking removal and login fixes completed. All deep linking code (blendlink://, app store URLs, AppOpenPrompt) has been successfully removed. Email login, Google OAuth, and all core features work correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check API (200 OK)
Backend: Root API endpoint
Backend: Email login with test@test.com / Test123456
Backend: Invalid credentials rejection (401)
Backend: Non-existent user rejection (401)
Backend: User registration
Backend: Duplicate email rejection (400)
Backend: Google OAuth - new user creation
Backend: Google OAuth - existing user login
Backend: Profile fetch with auth token
Backend: Wallet balance endpoint
Backend: Wallet transactions endpoint
Backend: Posts feed endpoint
Backend: Unauthorized access rejection (401)
Backend: Marketplace listings (public)
Backend: Marketplace categories (public)
Backend: Services list (public)
Backend: Rental properties (public)
Backend: Raffles list (public)
Backend: Daily claim - awards 10,000 BL Coins
Backend: Daily claim - prevents double claiming
Frontend: Login page loads with email and Google auth options
Frontend: Email login flow - redirects to /feed after success
Frontend: Feed page loads with Daily Reward banner and Coming Soon placeholder
Frontend: Wallet page shows balance (10,100 BL Coins) and Daily Claim button
Frontend: Profile page shows user info, BL Coins, referral code, and media shortcuts
Frontend: Marketplace page loads with listings and categories
Frontend: Services page loads with service listings
Frontend: Rentals page loads correctly
Frontend: No blendlink:// deep links in any page
Frontend: No app store URLs in any page
Frontend: ComingSoonPlaceholder simplified without app store buttons
critical_code_review_comments: All deep linking code successfully removed from codebase
ComingSoonPlaceholder component simplified - only shows title and description
Google OAuth uses POST /api/auth/google endpoint correctly
Login flow works end-to-end with proper token storage
Daily claim awards 10,000 BL Coins and prevents double claiming

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load correctly, no deep links found)

seed_data_creation: Created test users via registration and Google OAuth endpoints during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deep linking removal verified - no blendlink://, app store URLs, or AppOpenPrompt component found. All auth flows (email login, registration, Google OAuth) work correctly. Daily claim awards 10,000 BL Coins. Wallet shows correct balance. Profile page has media shortcuts (Upload Media, My Media, Offers, Browse Media).
